title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running LLMs (Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) locally with a simple API and Docker images.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; chat, generate, and pull models via Ollama’s REST API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as chat, LLM, and embedding components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI (formerly Ollama WebUI) for chatting, managing models, RAG, and multi-user workspaces; runs via Docker.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama offering synchronous & asynchronous APIs for chat, generate, pull, and embed.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem wrapping Ollama’s REST endpoints for chat, generate, and embeddings.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built Go CLI that wraps the Ollama REST API for easier model pulls, listing, and chatting from the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-style plugin that uses local Ollama models for IDE code completions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama server and models on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling options.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.x integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator for building RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community C# client for Ollama with async chat, generate, and model management; targets .NET Standard 2.0+.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Ready-to-run Retrieval-Augmented Generation stack using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + LangChain for PDF Q&A.

title: ollama-nest
summary: NestJS module that injects an Ollama service for chat, generate, and embeddings inside TypeScript backend apps.

title: ollama-django
summary: Simple Django app exposing Ollama chat via REST and WebSockets with a React frontend included.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a command palette to query local Ollama models and insert results into notes.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that streams responses from Ollama models in chat channels with slash commands.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Lightweight Slack bot using Bolt JS to interact with Ollama for on-demand chat and code help inside workspaces.

title: ollama-ktor
summary: Kotlin Ktor client for Ollama providing coroutine-based chat, generate, and embedding APIs for JVM backends.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate offering async/await wrappers over Ollama’s REST API for chat, generate, and embeddings.
